title: boltonia caroliniana
intro: Boltonia caroliniana, also known as Carlin's plume or drooping white aster, is a perennial plant species native to eastern North America. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Boltonia caroliniana include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and aid in the treatment of respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs. Traditionally, herbal preparations of Boltonia caroliniana include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves and flowers in hot water or mixing them with a carrier oil.
